message:
feat(telemetry): add UnifiedTelemetryRecord adapters for PolicyMetricsDashboard and ComplianceSnapshot

Bridges two gaps in the telemetry pipeline where policy subsystem snapshots
had no path into the unified telemetry layer:

- from_policy_metrics_dashboard(): maps HealthStatus to HealthTier, captures
  all dashboard counters, derives FailureClass from kill-switch/chain-integrity
- from_compliance_snapshot(): maps ComplianceStatus to HealthTier, captures
  violation/quarantine counters, derives FailureClass from violations

Both include From<&T> trait impls for ergonomic conversion. 6 unit tests
covering healthy/critical/kill-switch/invalid-chain paths.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
